title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入摩尔多瓦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入摩爾多瓦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Moldova market entry requirements governed by ISM, ANRE, and Moldelectrica, with CE/EN-oriented safety evidence, product-level conformance paths, grid-interconnection review, fire-safety installation assessment, and UN 38.3 transport expectations versus China GB/T documentation. Moldova uses 230/400 V 50 Hz and is landlocked, with Danube access through Giurgiulești and most electricity-market transit or project support via Romanian corridors.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与摩尔多瓦ISM、ANRE与Moldelectrica管理下的市场准入要求对照，包含CE/EN导向的安全证据、产品合规路径、并网审查、消防安全安装评估，以及与中国GB/T文件对比的UN 38.3运输要求。摩尔多瓦电网名义为230/400 V 50 Hz，该国为内陆国，通过Giurgiulești（多瑙河）港口并借助罗马尼亚通道参与跨境物流。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與摩爾多瓦ISM、ANRE與Moldelectrica管理下的市場准入要求對照，包含CE/EN導向的安全證據、產品合規路徑、併網審查、消防安全安裝評估，以及與中國GB/T文件對比的UN 38.3運輸要求。摩爾多瓦電網名義為230/400 V 50 Hz，該國為內陸國，通過Giurgiulești（多瑙河）港口並借助羅馬尼亞通道進行跨境物流。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, ISM scope determination, ANRE licence decision, Moldelectrica interconnection approval, dangerous-goods classification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project developers, designers, and installers should verify current Moldova ISM, ANRE, Moldelectrica, local fire authority, customs, and site-level requirements with qualified Moldova professionals before shipment, sale, interconnection, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、ISM适用范围裁定、ANRE许可决定、Moldelectrica并网批准、危险货物分类或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目开发商、设计方和安装方在出货、销售、并网或安装前，应与合格摩尔多瓦专业人士核实现行ISM、ANRE、Moldelectrica、地方消防、海关及现场要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、ISM適用範圍裁定、ANRE許可決定、Moldelectrica併網批准、危險貨物分類或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、並網或安裝前，應與合格摩爾多瓦專業人士核實現行ISM、ANRE、Moldelectrica、地方消防、海關及現場要求。

answer_first.en: For China-to-Moldova BESS exports, the practical baseline is a CE/EN-oriented conformity pathway where in-scope electrical, EMC, and energy-safety obligations are built around applicable Moldovan-adopted international standards and ANRE project requirements. Moldova shares 50 Hz with China but nominal voltage is 230/400 V rather than China’s 220/380 V, so inverter and protection settings should be project-verified. Additional work is usually on ANRE/Moldelectrica grid-connection documentation, ISM-based product safety documentation, fire-safety/installation acceptance, and transport documentation for the landlocked route to Giurgiulești with Romanian transfer corridors.
answer_first.zh: 中国储能电池系统出口摩尔多瓦时，实际基线是符合CE/EN导向路径，在适用的摩尔多瓦采标国际标准和ANRE项目要求下完成电气、EMC和能源安全义务。摩尔多瓦与中国同为50 Hz电网，但额定电压为230/400 V，不是中国220/380 V，因此应核验逆变器与保护参数。另一个重点通常是ANRE / Moldelectrica的并网文件、ISM导向产品安全文件、消防安全和安装验收，以及通过Giurgiulești经罗马尼亚通道的内陆运输文件要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國儲能電池系統出口摩爾多瓦時，實務基準是符合CE/EN導向路徑，在適用之摩爾多瓦採標國際標準及ANRE專案要求下完成電氣、EMC與能源安全義務。摩爾多瓦與中國同為50 Hz電網，但額定電壓為230/400 V，不是中國220/380 V，因此應核驗逆變器與保護參數。另有重點通常在ANRE / Moldelectrica的併網文件、ISM導向產品安全文件、消防安全與安裝驗收，以及通過Giurgiulești經羅馬尼亞通道的內陸運輸文件要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
